name: gitnexus-debugging
tagline: Guides debugging via GitNexus code-graph queries: find suspect code, trace callers/callees, confirm root cause.
verdict: Clear, concrete, read-only workflow with good worked examples and no security concerns. It never states an exclusion from adjacent skills (exploring/cli), assumes the GitNexus MCP tools are simply available without an explicit check, and has no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion language anywhere; could misfire against the sibling exploring or cli skills.
Assumes GitNexus MCP tools (query/context/cypher/trace) are available with no declaration or check beyond a staleness note.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
